objective: Consume the accepted D1 filing handoff and build the append-only, replayable document-to-total-headcount data plane required by issue #70.
claim_ceiling: E3 multi-issuer Local/CI headcount extraction candidate; no live model, factor, Staging, or release claim

requirements: accepted D1 handoff remains byte-identical and authorizes this batch
base_sha updated to the current implementation PR base commit
headcount corpus paths and SHA-256 frozen before execution
reviewer assigned and different from the implementation owner
migration lease reserves 0020 and the dedicated SQL contract path
GitHub issue body contains this manifest path and exact SHA-256
Delivery Governance CI passes offline validation and live GitHub parity

dependencies.artifact: accepted D1 normalized filing, capture, snapshot, and runner handoff

later_claim_dependencies: D1 producer evidence already pins the accepted #57/#58 contract tree; any contract-tree change reruns H0
#59 accepted total-headcount and financial-issuer semantics before the E2 semantic handoff freezes
#60 accepted exact model/source/rights/budget policy before any live call or E2 model-policy freeze
#61 accepted applicability and SLO denominator before downstream readiness acceptance
D2 medium-domain evidence converges before #26 and #27
#24 consumes only the exact accepted H0 factor-input handoff
#71 remains an untouched independent Core holdout

required_strata: D1 selected filing and PIT/restatement replay
stored replay without a source or extractor call
changed document, model, prompt, schema, or decoding vintage

source_ceiling: Checked-in filing bytes and frozen extractor responses only through E3. Live source or model calls require accepted #60 policy and a separate environment-scoped activation.

requirements: no default Definitions, registry entry, schedule, or route
no source or model credential in fixture execution
accepted ReleaseManifest model, template, registry, and configuration hashes exclude H0
negative test rejects release, Staging, unlisted-consumer, and mutable-model activation

negative_controls: wrong or stale D1 handoff identity
mutable model, prompt, schema, or decoding identity
partial, geographic, departmental, or contractor count selected as total
missing confidence, document, raw, invocation, or review lineage
UPDATE or DELETE against invocation and semantic vintages
factor-visible source, model, prompt, span, or review provenance
source, model, release, or Staging activation

output.retention: accepted E2 handoff and terminal E3 evidence are permanent; failed rung evidence follows CI retention

invalidation: D1 handoff, filing bytes, semantic policy, model/template/invocation, schema, PIT, span, or selection change creates a new revision
shared-toolkit finding invalidates the current rung and reruns the exact corpus
denominator or required-strata shrink creates a reviewed prospective revision and cannot repair prior evidence
handoff consumer or environment permission change creates a new handoff
revocation preserves prior evidence and blocks new activation
rollback: Revert only the latest H0 rung PR and revoke any produced handoff; immutable D1 evidence and append-only extraction vintages are never deleted.
